session.user: Run `ruff check src/erk/cli/ensure.py src/erk/cli/repo_resolution.py src/erk/cli/commands/admin.py src/erk/cli/commands/one_shot.py src/erk/cli/commands/wt/create_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/view_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/test_json_output.py` and report results.
session.assistant: I'll run ruff check on the specified files and report the results.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: uv run ruff check src/erk/cli/ensure.py src/erk/cli/repo_resolution.py src/erk/cli/command...[truncated 49 chars]...reate_cmd.py src/erk/cli/commands/objective/view_cmd.py tests/unit/cli/test_json_output.py

session.tool_result:
Exit code 1 UP022 Prefer `capture_output` over sending `stdout` and `stderr` to `PIPE` --> src/erk/cli/ensure.py:380:18 | 378 | import subprocess 379 | 380 | result = subprocess.run( | __________________^ 381 | | ["gh", "auth", "status"], 382 | | stdout=subprocess.PIPE, 383 | | stderr=subprocess.PIPE, 384 | | text=True, 385 | | ) | |_________^ 386 | if result.returncode != 0: 387 | raise UserFacingCliError( | help: Replace with `capture_output` keyword argument
UP022 Prefer `capture_output` over sending `stdout` and `stderr` to `PIPE` --> src/erk/cli/ensure.py:452:18 | 451 | # gt auth status returns 0 if authenticated, non-zero otherwise 452 | result = subprocess.run( | __________________^ 453 | | ["gt", "auth", "status"], 454 | | stdout=subprocess.PIPE, 455 | | stderr=subprocess.PIPE, 456 | | text=True, 457 | | )
... [26 lines omitted] ...
459 | raise UserFacingCliError( 484 | raise UserFacingCliError( Found 3 errors.
session.assistant:
ruff failed: 3 issues found
**File: src/erk/cli/ensure.py**
1. **Line 380** (UP022): Prefer `capture_output` over sending `stdout` and `stderr` to `PIPE` - Location: subprocess.run() call for "gh auth status" - Fix: Use `capture_output=True` instead of `stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE`
2. **Line 452** (UP022): Prefer `capture_output` over sending `stdout` and `stderr` to `PIPE` - Location: subprocess.run() call for "gt auth status" - Fix: Use `capture_output=True` instead of `stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE`
3. **Line 477** (UP022): Prefer `capture_output` over sending `stdout` and `stderr` to `PIPE` - Location: subprocess.run() call for "gh auth status" - Fix: Use `capture_output=True` instead of `stdout=subprocess.PIPE, stderr=subprocess.PIPE`
All violations are in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk/src/erk/cli/ensure.py` related to subprocess PIPE usage. These are fixable with `--unsafe-fixes` but require code modification.
